---
title: "AFM Image Summary"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AFM Image Summary}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Summary Data for AFM Images

This vignette demonstrates summary workflows using deterministic synthetic
images so examples are fast and reproducible.

```{r setup}
library(nanoAFMr)
set.seed(42)
img_list <- list(
  random = AFM.artificialImage(type = "random", addNoise = FALSE, verbose = FALSE),
  gradient = AFM.artificialImage(type = "gradient", addNoise = FALSE, verbose = FALSE),
  calibration = AFM.artificialImage(type = "calibration", addNoise = FALSE, verbose = FALSE)
)
for (nm in names(img_list)) {
  print(nm)
  print(summary(img_list[[nm]]))
}
```

# AFMmath summary

Computed metrics can be inspected with `AFM.math.params()` and `summary()`:

```{r}
for (nm in names(img_list)) {
  print(nm)
  print(summary(AFM.math.params(img_list[[nm]])))
}
```
